bead.title: ci: route benchmark lane atomic writes through safefs
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Branch CI for pushed master f792fdaa failed in the Security scan step. gosec reported G703 at cmd/bench/lanes.go:755 for os.WriteFile(tmp, data, 0o600) inside writeTextAtomic.

ROOT CAUSE
cmd/bench/lanes.go implemented its own atomic temp write for operator-selected benchmark lane paths instead of using the repo's centralized internal/safefs wrappers where intentional user-selected filesystem writes are documented for gosec.

PROPOSED FIX
Use safefs.MkdirAll and safefs.WriteFileAtomic in writeTextAtomic, preserving behavior while routing the intentional write through the audited wrapper.

NON-SCOPE
No benchmark lane behavior changes and no release workflow changes.
bead.acceptance: 1. go test ./cmd/bench -run Lane -count=1 passes.\n2. make gosec passes.\n3. master CI rerun for the fix commit passes.
